options.label: A
options.text: The total amount of force acting on an object

options.label: B
options.text: The force acting over a unit area

options.label: C
options.text: The weight of an object divided by its height

explanation: Pressure is defined as force divided by the area over which the force is applied. It tells us how concentrated a force is on a surface. A smaller area means higher pressure for the same force.
